message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Dashboard count is Marty's blocker — fix then push">
Marty's remaining blocking item is: **the dashboard next actions count is hardcoded** instead of showing a live count from the database. You need to wire up the actual active next actions count in the dashboard route/template using your count_active repository function.

Fix that, then commit and push everything together. That will be all 4 blocking items resolved.
</teammate-message>

content.text: The team-lead keeps repeating this item. Let me check if there's somehow a discrepancy -- maybe the working tree has uncommitted changes that reverted something, or the push didn't actually go through.

input.description: Verify HEAD and origin/main are the same commit

content.text:
HEAD and origin/main are the same commit (db795db). The dashboard template shows `{{ next_actions_count }} items` (not hardcoded). The route calls `next_action_service::count_active_next_actions()`. This is definitively already done.

The team-lead's reviewer agents are likely working from stale context. Let me respond one more time with the definitive proof and ask them to have the reviewers actually read the files.

input.content:
This fix is already done. I have triple-checked:

- HEAD == origin/main == db795db (same SHA)
- `templates/dashboard.html` line 20: `<dd>{{ next_actions_count }} items</dd>` (NOT hardcoded)
- `src/routes/dashboard.rs` line 28: `let next_actions_count = next_action_service::count_active_next_actions(&pool, &user_id).await`
- Integration test `dashboard_shows_dynamic_next_actions_count` passes (verifies 0 -> 1 after adding an action)
- CI run 21966145980 is green on this commit

Please ask Marty to read `templates/dashboard.html` and `src/routes/dashboard.rs` at HEAD to confirm. The fix was committed in db795db and pushed before this conversation started repeating.

All 4 blocking items are resolved. I am ready for consensus collection.
input.summary: Dashboard fix already done in db795db -- verified HEAD==origin/main
